name_en: 💖Includes full original green box packaging💖Wallet with GG details. Gucci leather goods push design boundaries, constantly reinterpreting classic pieces in a personalized way. This men's wallet combines classic GG Supreme canvas with black GG accessories, creating a refined accessory for modern fashion. Black leather trim, cloud-patterned fabric lining with GG details. Inside: 8 card slots, 1 bill compartment.

Closed Size: 11(W) x 9cm(H)

Made in Italy
